measurements.claim: The Navier-Stokes periodic skew-symmetry packet has a reference kernel receipt whose deterministic finite-mode nonlinear energy-transfer probe reports MATCH within declared tolerances.
The Navier-Stokes periodic skew-symmetry packet explicitly keeps the parent Navier-Stokes Millennium problem UNVERIFIABLE.
evidence: subclaim.skew_symmetry.md What This Does Not Prove section blocks Navier-Stokes parent promotion

measurements.claim: The packet includes negative boundaries that block promoting a finite-mode skew-symmetry witness into a global regularity theorem, physical-fluid validation, or new law-of-physics claim.
evidence: problem.statement.json negative_boundaries block parent, global regularity, physical-fluid, and law claims
subclaim.skew_symmetry.md What This Does Not Prove section lists parent/global/physical/law boundaries
run.receipt.json boundaries block arbitrary numerical discretization and physical-fluid validity
